prompt: A realistic editorial street-style fashion photo of a tall slim man standing on a city street in front of an ornate historic European stone building with arched windows and carved masonry details. He is centered in a vertical full-body-to-mid-thigh composition, standing with his arms crossed and a calm confident posture, looking slightly to the side. His face is intentionally obscured with a soft rectangular blur. He has thick wavy dark hair, medium length and slightly tousled. He wears a dark navy ribbed zip-up knit cardigan over a black turtleneck, loose high-waisted off-white trousers, and a silver wristwatch on his left wrist. Behind him on the right is a black Mercedes G-Class SUV parked curbside, clearly visible from the side and rear, and on the left is 1 silver compact hatchback parked farther back. The street is asphalt, the light is soft overcast daylight, and the color palette is muted, elegant, and slightly desaturated. Use shallow depth of field with the subject in focus and the background architecture and cars gently blurred. Luxury menswear editorial, candid yet polished, natural proportions, photorealistic, high detail, subtle cinematic mood.
